summary: Markets exhibit caution amid FOMC uncertainty and rising inflation fears, with Bitcoin sliding from near-$80K highs due to oil-driven risk aversion and 'higher for longer' Fed expectations. The US Dollar strengthens against the Swiss Franc supported by rising interest rates, while cryptocurrencies show mixed price movements. Commodities like gold are under analysis amid broader risk-off sentiment.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Bitcoin slid to $76,219 due to rising inflation fears, higher-for-longer Fed expectations, oil-driven risk aversion, and FOMC uncertainty.[1][4]

signals.name: Ethereum
signals.reason: ETH up +3.05% today amid broader crypto recovery signals despite BTC weakness.[5]
